name: Chlorine
immediateActions: Evacuate downwind. PPE: SCBA + chemical-protective clothing. No water on spill.

name: Liquefied petroleum gas
immediateActions: Eliminate ignition sources. SCBA. Evacuate 1 mi if tank engulfed in fire.

name: Ethanol
immediateActions: Use alcohol-resistant foam. SCBA + structural firefighter PPE.

name: Gasoline
immediateActions: Foam, dry chemical, or CO2. SCBA. Evacuate 0.5 mi if tank fire.

name: Sulfuric acid
immediateActions: No water directly on spill. SCBA + acid-resistant PPE.
